NORTHERN H OSK The minotaurs here are, for the most part, former members of the Fleet who mutinied. Knowing themselves to be beyond the safety of the law due to the nature of their crime, they fled from the land controlled by the League to relative safety in Northern Hosk. [PDF_PAGE 49 | score=3] 48 THE S PIRITUAL M INOTAUR BELIEF S YSTEMS In attempting to fathom minotaur belief systems, one must always consider their creed: Might makes right.
